data.name: Desire Den
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to the Desire Den.


Step into a fantasy unlike any other and interact with unique creatures all looking for one thing. A good time.
data.about_the_game:
Welcome to the Desire Den.


Step into a fantasy unlike any other and interact with unique creatures all looking for one thing. A good time.
data.short_description: Step into a fantasy unlike any other and interact with unique creatures all looking for one thing. A good time.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1 64 bit or newer
  • 處理器: Intel i5-4590 / AMD FX 8350 equivalent or greater.
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 or AMD Radeon RX 480, equivalent or better.
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1000 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1 64 bit or newer
  • 處理器: Intel i5-4590 / AMD FX 8350 equivalent or greater.
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 or AMD Radeon RX 480, equivalent or better.
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 1000 MB 可用空間
